text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Frontend: Types, parsers, mock data, hooks, verification logic, UI","description":"1. Install @mysten/walrus: `cd frontend && npm install @mysten/walrus`
2. types.ts: Add rootHash/encodingNonce to SkillListing, walrusBlobId to PurchaseReceipt, new IntegrityVerification interface
3. parsers.ts: Parse new fields in parseSkillListing() and parsePurchaseReceipt()
4. mock-data.ts: Add integrity fields to mock data
5. use-finalize-skill.ts: Add rootHash/encodingNonce to FinalizeSkillArgs and tx.moveCall arguments
6. Create verify-integrity.ts utility
7. Create use-verify-integrity.ts hook
8. create-skill-form.tsx: Compute blob metadata between encrypt and upload, pass to finalize
9. Create integrity-panel.tsx component
10. decrypt-button.tsx: Add receipt/skill props, run verification after download, render IntegrityPanel
11. receipt-card.tsx: Pass new props to DecryptButton
12. skill/[id]/page.tsx: Pass new props to DecryptButton
13. Run `cd frontend && npm run build` and ensure no errors.","assignedBy":"frontend-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-05T01:15:02.735Z"}
